subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise befitteth and beseemeth the Lord of Names, Who, through one of His names, hath illumined the Most Great Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر ثنا مالک اسما را لایق و سزاست که باسمی از اسماء خود منظر اکبر را منور
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @presence of; reunion with God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God
